name: Classic Haircut
description: A timeless cut tailored to your style, finished with a wash and hot-towel refresh.

name: Skin Fade
description: Precision fade blended down to the skin for a clean, sharp modern look.

name: Beard Trim & Shape
description: Detailed beard line-up and shaping with hot towel and beard oil finish.

name: Hot Towel Straight Razor Shave
description: Traditional straight razor shave with hot towels, pre-shave oil, and aftershave balm.

name: Haircut & Beard Combo
description: Our most popular package: a full haircut paired with a beard trim and shape.

name: Kids Cut (Under 12)
description: A patient, friendly cut for the little ones, styled just how they like it.

name: Hair Design / Line Work
description: Custom freehand designs and razor line work to make your cut one of a kind.
